assertions.rationale: TestAuthHandler is a well-known pattern in ASP.NET Core testing

assertions.assertion: Includes an ITestClaimsProvider (or equivalent) interface that allows setting claims per-test
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might use a simpler static field approach rather than a proper ITestClaimsProvider interface

assertions.assertion: The WebApplicationFactory registers the test auth scheme via AddAuthentication and AddScheme
assertions.rationale: This is standard WebApplicationFactory test auth pattern

assertions.assertion: Shows a test that calls ClearClaims (or equivalent) and asserts 401 Unauthorized
assertions.rationale: Testing 401 for unauthenticated is a standard test pattern

assertions.assertion: Does NOT disable authorization entirely -- authorization policies remain active
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might suggest a pattern that bypasses authorization or not explicitly preserve it
